experiment_name: Preventing Drought Stress via Precision Moisture Management
hypothesis_analysis: This protocol explores the sensor-feedback system's efficacy in preventing underwatering and drought stress, a common issue with infrequent fixed watering. PLANT_1 receives infrequent, large-volume watering, simulating neglect or insufficient fixed schedules, while PLANT_2 consistently maintains adequate moisture, directly testing the hypothesis against water scarcity.

data_collection.notes: Images will be used to measure Leaf Area and Height. Soil moisture levels will be continuously logged for both plants.
